message:
fix(cli): recognize -cli binary names and fall back to listener PIDs for alias-launched servers

Add mcp-agent-mail-cli and mcp_agent_mail_cli variants to the executable
signature matcher so servers launched via the CLI binary are correctly
identified. Introduce resolved_agent_mail_listener_pids() which falls
back to raw listener PIDs when the health check confirms an Agent Mail
server but no signed process names matched (e.g. 'am' alias). Includes
unit tests for the PID selection logic and a rustfmt indentation fix in
doctor_cleanup_orphaned_message_recipients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
